description: The Nuova camorra pugliese was a criminal organization based in Apulia, Italy, active from the early 1970s to the mid-1980s. It was founded by Raffaele Cutolo as an offshoot of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata. The group operated mainly in the provinces of Foggia and Taranto. It was eventually absorbed by the Sacra corona unita.
